title: invAIriant Lens Descriptor
description: Machine-readable descriptor of an audit lens. The markdown lens file remains the canonical human definition; this descriptor exists so tools and agents can select, list, and enforce lenses.

pack.description: Owning pack. Standard packs: core, systems, implementation, correctness, security-safety, ai-generated-code, domain. Custom packs are allowed.

required_evidence_types.description: Evidence types typical for this lens. Findings may use any valid type; this list guides auditors.

mandatory_by_default.description: True for lenses every audit should include unless the config opts out (e.g. security-threat, mcconnell).

critical_domain.description: True if the lens is subject to the stricter critical-domain severity threshold (security, safety, privacy, and domain lenses tied to the project's core risk).

cross_listed_in.description: Other packs this lens is cross-listed into (reference stubs, not forks).

file.description: Repo-relative path to the canonical markdown lens file.

applies_to.description: Project types this lens fits, e.g. ['infra-service', 'ai-agent-system'].
